  "summary": "This chunk contains detailed excerpts from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849), including a scrying ritual invoking spirits Astra, Astaroth, Cebal, Toth, Zambrim, Mambrim, Vsuel, and Saduel; a list of named demons (Barbarus, Cason, Otius, Cvrson, Alugor, Taob, Volach, Gaeneron, Twueries, Hanni, Svca) with ranks, legions, appearances, and powers; and two major rituals: one for obtaining information from a mirror using verbena and olive oil, and another love magic ritual invoking infernal spirits Bel and Ebal. It also includes extensive exorcistic material invoking biblical divine names (Pneumaton, Anathematon, Elyon, Geremon, etc.), patriarchs/prophets (Moses, Abraham, Jacob, Aaron, Daniel, Elias), and scriptural references (Exodus plagues, Revelation). Protective circle rituals with Agla, Sabaoth, Tetragramaton, Adonay are described in detail.",
